ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (Female, Male, Other) */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Indicator for hypertension (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "heart_disease" INTEGER /* Indicator for heart disease (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "ever_married" INTEGER /* Indicator for ever being married (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "avg_glucose_level" REAL /* Average glucose level of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (formerly_smoked, never_smoked, smokes) */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Type of residence (Urban, Rural) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for each patient */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "govt_job" INTEGER /* Indicator for government job (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "never_worked" INTEGER /* Indicator for never having worked (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicator for private employment (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "self_employed" INTEGER /* Indicator for self-employment (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the patient */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the patient is employed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current employment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "has_children" INTEGER /* Indicator for having children (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the patient has */,
  "child_ages" TEXT /* Ages of the children (e.g., '3, 5, 7') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Indicator for hypertension (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "heart_disease" INTEGER /* Indicator for heart disease (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Indicator for diabetes (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "stroke" INTEGER /* Indicator for stroke (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications the patient is currently taking */,
  "surgeries" TEXT /* History of any surgeries the patient has undergone */,
  "family_medical_history" TEXT /* Significant family medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (formerly_smoked, never_smoked, smokes) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption level (low, moderate, high) */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Physical activity level (low, moderate, high) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Dietary habits of the patient (e.g., vegetarian, omnivore) */,
  "sleep_hours" REAL /* Average number of hours the patient sleeps per night */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Stress level of the patient (low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metrics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metrics record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "avg_glucose_level" REAL /* Average glucose level of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "cholesterol_level" REAL /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure level (normal, high, low) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the health metrics were measured */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient (e.g., A+, B-, O+) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metrics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (Female, Male, Other) */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Type of residence (Urban, Rural) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient (high_school, college, graduate) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the patient (low, moderate, high) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient (single, married, divorced) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_risk_factors" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hypertension_risk" TEXT /* Risk level for hypertension (low, moderate, high) */,
  "heart_disease_risk" TEXT /* Risk level for heart disease (low, moderate, high) */,
  "diabetes_risk" TEXT /* Risk level for diabetes (low, moderate, high) */,
  "stroke_risk" TEXT /* Risk level for stroke (low, moderate, high) */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk factors were last assessed */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to mitigate risk factors */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_risk_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
